raw_consumer_statement: The vendor charged my credit card for {$710.00} XXXX XX/XX/year>, but the amount shown in the receipt was {$530.00}. I am unable to reach the vendor by phone, so I filed the dispute with the credit company ( Citi bank ). Citi sent me a request form for information. I filled in the form and sent it back to Citi immediately. But Citi declined my dispute for the reason " information is incomplete ''. I called Citi, first Citi said the receipt I sent to them is not clear, and second time they said the information I sent to them was overdue. I requested Citi to get charge details from the vendor, but Citi failed to do so. Even worse, Citi started charge me later fee and interest on the dispute amount.
